findings: All refrigeration units within required temperature range. Food storage properly labeled and dated. Employee hand-washing logs current. Slip hazard at entrance during rain identified - wet floor sign present but inadequate coverage.
corrective_actions: Added second wet floor sign and anti-slip mat at entrance. Updated rainy day safety checklist.

findings: TurboChef ovens calibrated and within spec. Prep table refrigeration functioning. POS terminals operational. Bread slicer blade guard functional post-incident inspection. Walk-in cooler seal slightly worn on left door.
corrective_actions: Ordered replacement door gasket for walk-in cooler. Installed within 3 days.
